case_title: TAI TRAN VS. SAN FRANCISCO SOUP COMPANY

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRAN, TAI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SOUP COMPANY $696.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $771.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,500.00 FILED BY TRAN, TAI AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SOUP COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-18-2013 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SOUP COMPANY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-11-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO SOUP COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-18-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-18-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANTF WAS REPRESENTED BY JAMES HOWELL--HR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-18-2013 - JUDGMENT.
